title: Day Night Split Beauty Comparison Portrait AI
sourceTitle: Day Night Split Beauty Comparison Portrait AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Side-by-side upper-body portrait comparison of fictional blonde Hollywood actress, split cleanly into Day and Night. Subject: fictional blonde Hollywood actress smiles warmly in both halves with identical pose, framing, camera angle, distance, and background, while styling changes from bare-faced no-makeup look, visible pores, light under-eye shadows, natural lips, loosely styled hair, and cozy simple white T-shirt to full glam makeup, soft contouring, mascara, eyeliner, defined brows, soft lipstick, elegant hair, and beautiful high-neck pink dress. Scene: Clean split-screen portrait layout with bold text labels at the top of each half and a candid smartphone portrait-mode atmosphere. Composition: Fixed 3:4 portrait split straight down the center; left half is Day, right half is Night, same upper-body crop and matched head position for honest visual contrast. Signature Elements: Preserved day night split beauty comparison portrait source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: Smartphone portrait mode look with handheld feel, natural lighting, slight digital noise, mild compression artifacts, realistic color balance, minimal retouching, honest skin detail, and candid comparison mood. Color Palette: Natural morning tones on the left, brighter glam styling on the right, realistic skin color, and balanced non-studio color grading. Typography: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
